name: Hardy-Weinberg baseline
summary: At large N with no selection, no mutation, no migration, and random mating, allele frequencies stay in p² + 2pq + q² equilibrium.

vidas_prompts.prompt: At generation 0, describe the variation you see in body color in the tank.
Pick one creature. Use the organism view to show the parent-child inheritance path back two generations.
Track the allele-0 frequency for BodyColor over 50 generations. How much does it change?
Does the population look different in generation 50 than in generation 0?
Under what specific conditions does this baseline hold? What happens if you break one?
